notes: Plays Opus, ships a sample track, adds a Track Info window (embedded tags + cover art) and an album-art visualizer mode.

win.notes: Windows build refresh with tinyjs 0.28.2: a real icon on the exe, no stray console windows, and a leaner install (just the exe and its launcher).

linux.notes: Linux: native 10-band EQ + full AutoEq headphone correction (PipeWire), balance, HLS radio via hls.js, resizable satellite windows, and a 2x double-size mode straight out of Winamp.
